AGISS Roll-On Wax
products.body_html:
AGISS Depilatory Roll-On Wax works effectively even with the shortest hairs and provides silky smooth skin for up to 4 weeks! Should be used with care in curved and sensitive areas of the body.

Application area

  • Arm & leg area

Product Features:

  • Made of 100% natural resin. Thanks to its special head, it is thin and easy to apply. Cleans even very short hairs from the root. When used regularly, ensures a decrease in hair growth.
  • May be used only on flat surfaces of the body such as arms, legs, and abdomen. Not suitable for use in curved areas such as the face, armpits, or bikini area.

Usage Information

Heat the wax with a double boiler or a suitable Agiss Warmer set so that no water can enter it. When it reaches a spreadable consistency, first check the temperature and then apply a thin layer to the area you want to remove. Stick the Agiss Wax Cloth on the wax against the direction of hair growth. Pull the cloth in one motion.

Warnings

While heating the wax, you should avoid contact with water with inside content. Do not use the product directly without testing it in one area of the body.

products.title: Agiss Hard Wax Beans 220g - Available in 4 types
products.body_html:
With its special formula, it removes even very short hair from its root. Decreases hair when used regularly. Apply without any epilation cloth. Suitable for professional and home use. 
  • Use without strips
  • Dermatologically Tested
  • Origin: Turkey
Application area
  • Legs, arms, and bikini area. Sensitive hard wax beans (pink bag) can be used on the face with care

For best results

  • Apply to clean and dry skin
  • Apply the wax with a spatula in a thin layer n the direction of hair growth
  • For easier use, thicken the wax at the end where you will pull the wax
  • After 4 - 5 seconds, pull in a single movement against the direction of hair growth

Usage Information

Put the hard bean wax in a bowl and heat it in a double boiler. When it reaches the spreadable consistency, check its temperature and use a spatula to apply a thin layer of hair to the area you want to remove. Once the hard bean wax has taken a fix form, take the spatula and pull it in the opposite direction of the hair growth with a sharp angle.

Not suitable to re-melt the wax used before.

Warnings

  • Before the application, apply it to a small area of ​​your body and check its temperature. If an allergic reaction occurs during test, avoid use of product.
  • Do not apply more than once to the same area.
  • Do not clean with soap and water after application. Recommended to clean after with Agiss Waxing Wipes or Agiss Wax Cleaning Oil.
  • Store in a dry place away from sunlight.
